title: B.Tech. in Manufacturing Science & Engineering
description: Four-year B.Tech. program focused on Manufacturing Science & Engineering, covering mechanical engineering principles, advanced manufacturing processes, robotics, and automation.
Developed a strong foundation for advanced research in manufacturing, process optimization, and engineering design.

thesis.title: Robotics Work Volume Optimization
thesis.description: Conducted research and project work on optimizing the work volume of industrial robotic manipulators to improve operational efficiency, flexibility, and reach for automated manufacturing systems.
